headline: NetApp (NTAP) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: NetApp (NTAP) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
